Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Response To A Depostion Question, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-13-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Russell Davis for plaintiff and moving party

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel answers at deposition is granted. The Court finds that instructing the witness not to answer the specified question was without substantial justification. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $786.30 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to a mutually convenient date to resume the deposition of the witness to answer the question and any other reasonable follow-up questions. The deposition is to be completed by December 28, 2005. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
